title: AllianceCraft Network
description:
ModPack Criado para ser utilizado na AllianceCraft Network.

Survival 1.20.4 é aqui!

Cliente otimizado Versão 1.20.4 da AllianceCraft Network
body: ### PT-BR # Modpack Criado para ser utilizado na AllianceCraft Network. Survival 1.20.1 é aqui! Cliente otimizado Versão 1.20.1 da AllianceCraft Network [Fórum do AllianceCraft](https://alliancecraft.net) [Loja do AllianceCraft](https://loja.alliancecraft.net) [Vote em Nosso Servidor](https://alliancecraft.net/vote) [Discord do AllianceCraft](https://dc.alliancecraft.net) IP Java: `alliancecraft.net` / `jogar.alliancecraft.net` / `alliancecraft.com.br` / `jogar.alliancecraft.com.br` IP Bedrock: `alliancecraft.net` / `jogar.alliancecraft.net` / `alliancecraft.com.br` / `jogar.alliancecraft.com.br` Porta: `19132` > Modpack criado com base no modpack [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) > > Modpack Lite criado com base no modpack [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) > Este modpack contém mods para carregar nossa textura customizada como [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/version/1.0.2), [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures/version/4.5.1) e o [CIT Reswern](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/version/1.1.3+1.20) além de um mod de zoom chamado [Camera Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-utils/version/fabric-1.20.1-1.0.5) além de que alguns outros mods de performance poderão ser adicionados em um futuro não tão distante ### EN-US # ModPack Created for use in AllianceCraft Network. Survival 1.20.1 is here! AllianceCraft Network Optimized Client Version 1.20.1 [AllianceCraft Forum](https://alliancecraft.net) [AllianceCraft Store](https://loja.alliancecraft.net) [Vote for Our Server](https://alliancecraft.net/vote) [AllianceCraft Discord](https://dc.alliancecraft.net) Java IP: `alliancecraft.net` / `jogar.alliancecraft.net` / `alliancecraft.com.br` / `jogar.alliancecraft.com.br` Bedrock IP: `alliancecraft.net` / `jogar.alliancecraft.net` / `alliancecraft.com.br` / `jogar.alliancecraft.com.br` Port: `19132` > ModPack created from the [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized) modpack > > ModPack Lite created from the [Simply Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/sop) modpack > **Q: Are you allowed to redistribute the mods present in this modpack?** > A: Yes I do based on [license](https://github.com/Fabulously-Optimized/fabulously-optimized/blob/main/LICENSE.md) of Fablously Optimized > This modpack contains mods to load our custom texture such as [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/version/1.0.2), [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures/version/4.5.1) and [CIT Reswern](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/version/1.1.3+1.20) as well as a zoom mod called [Camera Utils](https://modrinth.com/mod/camera-utils/version/fabric-1.20.1-1.0.5) and some other performance mods may be added in the not too distant future.
